name: Admin's MFA: Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if MFA for admins is enabled

name: Anomaly Detection: Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if Anomaly Detection is enabled

name: Storage Encryption: Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if storage encryption is enabled

name: Automatic Updates: Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if automatic updates are enabled

name: Automatic Updates: Interval
description: This metric is used to assess if automatic updates are performed with sufficient frequency (hours)

name: Identity: Recent Activity
description: This metric is used to assess if a user is still active (days)

name: Application: Usage of Strong Cryptographic Hashes
description: This rule assesses whether a resource that offers the property CryptographicHash has its algorithm set correctly

name: Transport Encryption: Enabled
description: This metric is used if transport encryption is enabled

name: Identity Management: Implementation of Access Control Mechanisms
description: This metric checks for the existence of proper access control mechanisms

name: Vulnerability Scanning: Report Updated
description: This metric is used to assess if vulnerability scan reports are regularly updated and available

name: Configuration: Secure Configuration Enforced
description: This metric is used to assess if secure configuration is enforced by default

name: Automatic Updates: Postpone Alert Option Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if users can postpone updates and receive notifications

name: Identity: Password Policy Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if a password policy is enabled for identity management

name: Security Monitoring: Unauthorized Access Reported
description: This metric is used to assess if unauthorized access attempts are detected and reported

name: Privacy: Data Minimization Techniques Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if data minimization techniques are enabled and enforced

name: Privacy: Automated Deletion of Data Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if automated deletion of data is configured

name: Network Security: DDoS Protection Mechanism Activated
description: This metric is used to assess if DDoS protection mechanisms are activated

name: Network Security: Standard Protocols Listed
description: This metric is used to assess if only required standard protocols and interfaces are enabled

name: Risk Management: Risk Assessment Mapping to Services and Controls
description: This metric is used to assess if risk assessments are mapped to services and security controls

name: Data Protection: Backup Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if backup mechanisms are enabled for critical data flows

name: Logging & Monitoring: Activity Logging Enabled
description: This metric is used to assess if activity logging is enabled for security-relevant activities

name: Logging & Monitoring: Logging Opt-Out Mechanism Available
description: This metric is used to assess if a logging opt-out mechanism is available to users

name: Logging & Monitoring: Security Data Available to User
description: This metric is used to assess if security-related data and logs are available to users

name: Privacy: Secure Data Deletion Mechanism Activated
description: This metric is used to assess if secure data deletion mechanisms are activated and available to users
